nativeProps: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> with value, defaultValue, onChange, and children reserved

compositionPolicy.field: Field owns the integrated visible label, control ID, description, error, required, and invalid relationships.
compositionPolicy.value: Public values are immutable 8-bit sRGB channels. CSS-like text is an editor surface; the successful form value is canonical lowercase #rrggbb or #rrggbbaa.
compositionPolicy.editing: Incomplete or invalid text remains visible and marked invalid while the last accepted typed value is retained; Escape restores it. A valid controlled commit remains as a pending draft until the owner accepts or replaces it, and repeated Enter does not emit the same request twice. Composition is never committed mid-IME.
compositionPolicy.contrast: The preview reports a computed ratio and threshold outcome in text without claiming that a component, token pair, or page conforms.
